## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (skip for docs-only or internal changes).
- [ ] Docs updated if the change is user-facing (README / SECURITY / relevant `docs/`).
- [ ] No secrets committed (App Passwords, tokens, real mailbox contents).
